tools.title: Visual Processing Suite
tools.desc: Each tool runs entirely in your browser. No uploads to servers, no installations.

pixel.name: Pixel Sorter
pixel.desc: Sort pixels by brightness, hue or saturation along horizontal, vertical or diagonal axes. Classic glitch aesthetic.

dither.name: Dithering
dither.desc: Apply classic dithering algorithms: Floyd-Steinberg, ordered, Atkinson and more. Retro pixel aesthetics.

glitch.name: Glitch FX
glitch.desc: RGB channel shift, scanlines, block corruption, datamosh effects. Full control over intensity and style.

constellation.name: Constellation
constellation.desc: Overlay generative star maps, technical diagrams and node networks over your images. Export at high resolution.

ascii.name: ASCII Canvas
ascii.desc: Transform images into creative ASCII art with custom character sets and effects.

halftone.name: Halftone
halftone.desc: Create halftone dot patterns, CMYK separations, and retro print effects.

triangulation.name: Triangulation
triangulation.desc: Reconstruct images into a low-poly vector style using Delaunay triangulation.

flyer.name: Flyer Forge
flyer.desc: Generate flyers for music events with automatic, well-designed compositions.

crt.name: CRT Bend
crt.desc: Emulate CRT screen curvature, scanlines, and circuit-bent signal distortion.

pixel.name: ⟆ Pixel Sorter
pixel.desc: Sort pixels by brightness, hue or saturation. Load an image to start.

constellation.fileDrop: Click or drop an image here

ascii.name: ◊ ASCII Canvas
ascii.desc: Transform images into creative ASCII art with custom characters and effects.
ascii.fileDrop: Click or drop an image here

halftone.fileDrop: Click or drop an image here

about.title: How it Works
about.p1: PUDRUS.XYZ is a browser-based creative suite for image and video processing.
about.p2: Built with vanilla JavaScript. No frameworks, no accounts.

footer.note: Built in the browser, for the browser
